allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('height:', d.get\('block_height', d.get\('height'\)\)\); print\('hash:', d.get\('block_hash', d.get\('block_info',{}\).get\('block_hash', d.get\('hash'\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); h=d.get\('header',{}\); m=h.get\('metadata',{}\); print\('Metadata:', m\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); txs=d.get\('transactions',[]\); print\('Block height:', d.get\('header',{}\).get\('metadata',{}\).get\('height'\)\); print\('Num transactions:', len\(txs\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); txs=d.get\('transactions',[]\); print\('Block 123456 - txs:', len\(txs\)\); [print\('TX:', t.get\('id', t.get\('transaction_id'\)\), 'program:', t.get\('program_id', [p.get\('program'\) for p in t.get\('transitions',[]\)]]\)\) for t in txs]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); txs=d.get\('transactions',[]\); [print\('TX ID:', t.get\('id'\), 'Transitions:', [\(tr.get\('program'\), tr.get\('function_name'\)\) for tr in t.get\('transitions',[]\)]\) for t in txs]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d[k] for k in list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:5]}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('type:', d.get\('type'\)\); print\('keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('type:', d.get\('type'\)\); print\('fee_keys:', list\(d.get\('fee',{}\).keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(d.get\('fee'\), dict\) else 'N/A'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); txs=d.get\('transactions',[]\); print\('block_height:', d.get\('block_height'\)\); print\('num_txs:', len\(txs\)\); [print\('  tx_type:', t.get\('type'\), 'tx_id:', t.get\('id', t.get\('transaction_id'\)\)\) for t in txs[:3]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('latest_height:', d.get\('blocks',[{}]\)[0].get\('block',{}\).get\('header',{}\).get\('height'\) if d.get\('blocks'\) else 'N/A'\); [print\('block:', b.get\('block',{}\).get\('header',{}\).get\('height'\), 'num_txs:', len\(b.get\('block',{}\).get\('transactions',[]\)\)\) for b in d.get\('blocks',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:len\(str\(d[k]\)\) if k=='transactions' else d[k] for k in d}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('block_height:', d.get\('header',{}\).get\('metadata',{}\).get\('height'\)\); print\('num_txs:', len\(d.get\('transactions',[]\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) txs=d.get\('transactions',[]\) for t in txs: print\('TX keys:', list\(t.keys\(\)\)\) tx_inner = t.get\('transaction', {}\) print\('TX inner keys:', list\(tx_inner.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(tx_inner, dict\) else type\(tx_inner\)\) if isinstance\(tx_inner, dict\): print\(' execution keys:', list\(tx_inner.get\('execution', {}\).keys\(\)\) if 'execution' in tx_inner else 'N/A'\) print\(' id:', tx_inner.get\('id', 'N/A'\)\) print\(' transitions:', len\(tx_inner.get\('execution', {}\).get\('transitions', []\)\)\) for tr in tx_inner.get\('execution', {}\).get\('transitions', []\): print\(' Program:', tr.get\('program',''\)\) print\(' Function:', tr.get\('function_name',''\)\) if 'zkdrop' in str\(tr.get\('program',''\)\): print\(' *** ZKDROP FOUND ***'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('TX type:', d.get\('type'\)\) print\('TX keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:10]\) tx = d.get\('transaction', {}\) print\('Inner type:', tx.get\('type'\) if isinstance\(tx, dict\) else 'N/A'\) if isinstance\(tx, dict\): exe = tx.get\('execution', {}\) if isinstance\(exe, dict\): for tr in exe.get\('transitions', []\): prog = tr.get\('program', ''\) if 'zkdrop' in prog: print\('ZKDROP tx found!'\) print\('Function:', tr.get\('function_name'\)\) " echo "" echo "=== Check if zkdrop file_counter has ANY value ===")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for t in d.get\('transactions',[]\): if t.get\('status'\) in ['accepted','rejected']: print\('TX status:', t.get\('status'\)\) finalize = t.get\('finalize', []\) print\('Finalize entries:', len\(finalize\)\) for f in finalize[:5]: print\(' ', f\) ")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json;b=json.load\(sys.stdin\);txs=[t['id'] for t in b.get\('transactions',[]\)];print\(f'Block 15761257 txs: {len\(txs\)}'\);[print\(f'  {tx}'\) for tx in txs]")
